itunes_results.name: MyFitnessPal
itunes_results.category: dominant calorie and macro tracker with 14M+ food database; has consecutive-days streak feature but NOT a gamified macro LEARNING streak with XP for precision targets and nutrition knowledge level gates

itunes_results.category: adaptive macro coaching algorithm with consecutive weigh-in tracking; not gamified with XP and badge progression

itunes_results.name: Cronometer
itunes_results.category: precision micronutrient tracker with gold streak feature for consecutive logged days; streak-adjacent but not gamified with XP or macro education level gates

daily_macro_tracking_streak.notes: 1.47M community. MFP, Cronometer, MacroFactor all have streak-adjacent tracking. Gap exists for a gamified MACRO LEARNING streak (daily XP for precision macro splits, nutrition knowledge quizzes, protein completeness badges) distinct from passive tracking. MFP brand dominance makes this harder. SOFT_COMPETITION — viable if positioned as macro education not tracking.
